pom.xml.general_idea: Replace separate source and target configuration with the release flag in maven-compiler-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'release' flag is the modern standard for cross-compilation and ensures consistent API usage; while source/target might still work, release is preferred and often required for strict JDK 21 compliance in modern builds.
